expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies the project's tech stack
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: 5 findings across Structure (monolith), Duplication (jscpd clones), Error Handling (zero try/catch), State (token eviction), Security (XSS)

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: 'What's Working Well' with 6 items: focused scope, clean separation, webhook contract, security defaults, README quality, testing affordances

expectations.text: Report gives a clear picture of major components and relationships
expectations.evidence: Three-layer architecture described, tool system mapped, middleware explained, data layer documented

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
expectations.evidence: scc complexity (36 for server.js, 72%), jscpd clone clusters (3), ast-grep zero try/catch, specific line refs (server.js:105, :131, :338)

expectations.text: Report would help a new developer understand the codebase
expectations.evidence: Full architecture overview with stack table, CLI tools used table, clear component descriptions
